## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposal

Describe the change you want.

## Why this belongs here

Explain why this fits Club Threads specifically instead of being a generic wishlist item.

## Scope

- Small improvement
- New feature
- API change
- Infra / operational change
- Docs

## Additional context

Add mockups, examples, tradeoffs, or alternative approaches if relevant.
